subject: [DISCUSS] Release Apache OpenDAL v0.57.0
body:
GitHub user Xuanwo created a discussion: [DISCUSS] Release Apache OpenDAL v0.57.0

Hello, Apache OpenDAL Community,

This is a call for a discussion to release Apache OpenDAL version v0.57.0.

The change lists about this release:

https://github.com/apache/opendal/compare/v0.56.0...main

Please leave your comments here about this release plan. We will bump the version in the repo and start the release process after the discussion.

Thanks

Xuanwo


GitHub link: https://github.com/apache/opendal/discussions/7514

----
